summary.intent: Test PR #2587 (PyGithub 2.x + GitHub App auth upgrade) by identifying and running minimal Jenkins jobs that exercise all modified code paths, verifying that GITHUB_TOKEN is not used.
summary.outcome: Identified 3 minimal jobs covering 3 auth mechanisms (M1: PyGithub REST, M2: GIT_ASKPASS, M3: URL normalization). Ran ocp4-scan-konflux, gen-assembly, and build-fbc with DRY_RUN=true. Discovered build-fbc has 7 fallback cases using GITHUB_TOKEN due to missing org parameters in get_github_git_auth_env() calls.

repo: PR introduces 3 auth mechanisms: M1 (get_github_client_for_org), M2 (get_github_git_auth_env for GIT_ASKPASS), M3 (ensure_github_https_url for SSH-to-HTTPS conversion)
GitHub App auth requires org parameter when App has multiple installations; without it, falls back to GITHUB_TOKEN
Jobs using doozer runtime exercise gitdata.clone_data which tests git auth paths
Jenkins jobs accept ART_TOOLS_COMMIT param in format: ghuser@commitish to test PR branches

code.finding: build-fbc pipeline has 7 call sites invoking get_github_git_auth_env() without org parameter, causing fallback to PAT instead of GitHub App
GIT_PASSWORD token values are logged in plaintext in env dicts - security concern
Still uses SSH URLs (git@github.com:) for some ls-remote operations instead of applying ensure_github_https_url

workflow: All 3 test jobs (ocp4-scan-konflux, gen-assembly, build-fbc) support DRY_RUN=true for safe testing
Jenkins MCP server can fetch job parameters and trigger builds programmatically
ghs_* prefix on tokens confirms GitHub App installation tokens vs PATs

friction: Initial exploration analyzed entire branch diff including unrelated changes instead of just PR commits
Jenkins job path format requires URL encoding (build%2Focp4-scan-konflux)
Heredoc quoting conflicts when posting GitHub comments with single quotes in content
GitHub App installation tokens logged in plaintext is a security issue
open_items: Fix 7 call sites in build-fbc pipeline to pass org parameter to get_github_git_auth_env()
Redact GIT_PASSWORD values from build logs (tracked in separate chat)
Fix doozerlib.source_resolver to apply ensure_github_https_url for branch-checking ls-remote operations
Update GitHub PR comment with build-fbc #16570 results showing the GITHUB_TOKEN fallback issue
